articles.title: U.K. leaders call for calm as protests break out after Belfast street stabbing - NPR
articles.description: U.K. leaders called for calm Tuesday after the arrest of a Sudanese man accused of trying to kill a man in a vicious stabbing on a Belfast street sparked fiery anti-immigration protests.

articles.title: Live Updates: U.S. conducts retaliatory strikes after Trump says Iran shot down Apache helicopter - CBS News
articles.description: The two helicopter pilots were uninjured. After the retaliatory strikes were announced, President Trump said, "I believe the response should be very strong, very powerful."

articles.title: The Democratic establishment begrudgingly moves to embrace Graham Platner - Politico
articles.description: Democrats largely lined up behind their new Maine Senate nominee on Tuesday, while Republicans were quick to launch their attacks.

articles.title: ‘Toy Story 5’ First Reactions Praise Pixar’s Sequel as a ‘Deeply Profound’ and ‘Moving’ Film That ‘Ranks Right Alongside’ the Original - Variety
articles.description: The first reactions for 'Toy Story 5' suggest Pixar's long-running franchise remains in top form.

articles.title: Air Canada pilot flew passengers for years with a fake pilot’s license, police say - CNN
articles.description: A former Air Canada pilot faces criminal charges for flying tens of thousands of passengers for nearly 17 years with a fake pilot’s license, Canadian police announced Tuesday.

articles.title: U.S. official: Somalia's Omar Artan had suspected terror ties - ESPN
articles.description: A United States official said Tuesday night that Omar Artan, the Somalian referee who was denied entry into the country ahead of the World Cup, was refused admission due to "association with suspected members of terror organizations."

articles.title: How SpaceX’s IPO ambitions ride on Starship’s path to Mars - Financial Times
articles.description: Musk’s largest rocket must prove it can routinely fly before the company can deliver on its biggest promises

articles.title: Brazil 0-1 USA (Jun 9, 2026) Game Analysis - ESPN
articles.description: Expert recap and game analysis of the Brazil vs. United States Women's International Friendly game from June 9, 2026 on ESPN.

articles.title: Taiwan Test-Fires U.S.-Supplied Missile Launcher Toward China - WSJ
Andy Cohen Reveals Jennifer Lawrence Is Bravo "Super Fan" Who Helped Find 'Summer House' Reunion Leaker - Deadline
articles.description: Andy Cohen has revealed that Jennifer Lawrence helped Bravo identify the person behind the Summer House reunion audio leak.

articles.title: Trump argues lawsuit seeking to halt White House UFC fight was brought too ‘late’ - CNN
articles.description: The Trump administration is urging a federal judge to reject a bid to stop an upcoming UFC fight at the White House, arguing that a lawsuit from two Virginia residents against the event was brought too late to justify judicial intervention now.

articles.title: Steve Hilton edges out Tom Steyer in California governor race - BBC
articles.description: If British-born Hilton wins in November, will be the first Republican governor in 15 years.

articles.title: Russian Offensive Campaign Assessment, June 9, 2026 - Institute for the Study of War
articles.description: The Kremlin is seeking to delegitimize the results of Armenia’s June parliamentary elections, in which Civil Contract Party won a majority.

articles.title: Nancy Mace loses GOP primary for South Carolina governor - Politico
articles.description: The representative, who has a history of bucking and then cozying up to the president, failed to make the runoff Tuesday.

articles.title: 2026 AHA/ACC/ADA/ASN Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation, and Management of Cardiovascular-Kidney-Metabolic Syndrome - professional.heart.org
articles.description: Guideline offering updated evidence on cardiovascular‑kidney‑metabolic syndrome for clinicians managing obesity, diabetes, CKD, and cardiovascular disease.

articles.title: Live Now: Maine statewide and local election results - Portland Press Herald - Maine Sunday Telegram
articles.description: Real-time statewide and town-by-town results for Maine’s 2026 primary and local elections. Use the navigation below to view maps and results for each race. Polls close at 8 p.m.

articles.title: Lindsey Graham Wins GOP Senate Primary in South Carolina, DDHQ Projects - Bloomberg
articles.description: Incumbent Lindsey Graham, who was endorsed by President Trump, is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in South Carolina, according to DDHQ.

articles.title: I tried Siri AI, and so far it actually works - The Verge
articles.description: Siri AI is Apple’s second attempt at an AI assistant, and it looks like this one might stick.
